lighting.shadow_character: 부드럽고 디테일이 살아있음 (Fill Light 사용 추정)

texture.detail_rendering: 최상급. 고기, 밥, 양파 등의 질감이 사실적으로 표현됨

improvement_notes: 조명: 림 라이트 추가로 입체감 극대화. 색감: 주 피사체 채도만 국소적으로 올려 생동감 추가 (컬러 팝). 구도: 역동적 연출 또는 배경 단순화로 주제 집중.
nano_banana_prompt: /imagine prompt: professional food photography of [YOUR FOOD HERE], 45-degree angle shot, medium close-up, cinematic and moody atmosphere, shot on 85mm f/1.8 lens, shallow depth of field with sharp focus on the main ingredient, soft and diffused lighting from a large softbox on the left, creating gentle shadows, color graded in Kodak Portra 400 film style, desaturated colors with warm tones, lifted blacks for a matte finish, served in a rustic ceramic bowl on a dark wooden table, hyper-detailed food texture, subtle film grain --ar 2:3 --style raw
